heading: API Documentation
body:
To learn more about any of the methods or types discussed in this
usage example, see the following API Documentation:

- [withSession()](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/MongoClient.html#withSession)

- [withTransaction()](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/ClientSession.html#withTransaction)

- [abortTransaction()](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/ClientSession.html#abortTransaction)"
